title: Why Got Fired Matters
topic: WE GOT FIRED in Animal Hospital Anomaly..
voiceover: They have to make tough decisions quickly But sometimes they just can't save every animal that needs their help Like when an animal's injuries are too severe and treatment isn't an option Or when they're not sure what's causing the animal's illness or injury But there's a science-based way to handle those situations for the animal's well-being By prioritizing the animal's quality of life and making the best choice
